description_long: This is a metallic kettle with a rounded, dome-shaped body and a matte, slightly textured finish. The kettle features a prominent, arched black handle mounted on top, which appears to be made of a heat-resistant material. A short, angled spout with a hinged cap is attached to the side, designed for controlled pouring and likely to produce a whistling sound when steam escapes. The lid is circular and slightly domed, topped with a spherical knob for easy removal. The base of the kettle is wide and flat, providing stability when placed on surfaces. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, with no visible decorative patterns.
description: A dome-shaped metallic kettle with a matte finish, arched black handle, and a short spout with a hinged cap. It has a domed lid with a round knob and a wide, flat base.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the circular lid with a central knob and the arched handle aligned above, with the spout and cap visible at the front edge.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the spout with its hinged cap, the domed lid with knob, and the full arch of the black handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted curve of the kettle's back and the handle's attachment points, with no spout visible.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing both the spout with its cap and the handle, as well as the kettle's rounded body and flat base.
attribute_lid_design: domed removable lid with round knob
